The A/C in my car went out when I was driving back from Phoenix to San Diego after game 5 of the NBA Finals. 

Took 5 years but I finally did the thing.

A rock likely hit my condenser on the drive to PHX and then the evaporator core went out, which involves tearing out the entire dash 🙃
